description: Corrected 4-model Δv comparison: forward-velocity profile of baseline (warmup-only) vs adversarial (warmup + 500 adversarial batches) for both LinearController (regulator) and LinearTrackerController. Δv = (peak_v(adv) - peak_v(base)) / peak_v(base), evaluated at pert_scale=0 (the controller's designed-against threat is the only structural difference).
